Order Management

Manage online food orders, all from a single point

Stop juggling multiple apps. Foaps brings all your delivery orders into one unified dashboard so your team can focus on great food.

Start for Free See a Demo

Everything you need to handle orders at scale

  • 📥

    Receive from all platforms

    Get orders from Swiggy, Zomato, Dunzo and more in one inbox. Never miss an order again.

  • ✅

    Accept & reject with one tap

    Accept or reject orders from a single interface. No more switching between apps.

  • 🔔

    Real-time notifications

    Get instant alerts for every new order, so you can respond quickly and keep customers happy.

  • 📋

    Order history & tracking

    Access complete order history and track status across all delivery platforms.

  • 🖨️

    Auto-print receipts

    Automatically print order receipts for your kitchen team as soon as an order arrives.

  • 🔄

    Multi-outlet support

    Manage orders across multiple restaurant outlets from the same account.

How it works

One dashboard. Every order.

When a customer places an order on Swiggy, Zomato, or Dunzo, Foaps receives it instantly and displays it in your unified order queue. Your staff can accept, track, and manage the order without ever touching a different app.

Orders are logged, timestamps recorded, and history preserved — giving you a complete picture of your order flow at any time.

Get Started Free

Ready to streamline your order management?

Join hundreds of restaurants already using Foaps to handle orders effortlessly.
